---
title: "spine_map_bias"
format: revealjs
---

![](media/spine_content_map.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

::: notes
We've seen this map of the process of fitting models before
:::

## 

![](media/spine_lec_05.png){fig-align="center" height=600}

::: notes
Today we focus on the final parts of the process - assessing bias in the model, and corrective action.
:::
